untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'higher timeframe tipping point' and 'structure stress' via multi-timeframe analysis, which cannot be expressed as single-timeframe indicator conditions. Requires explicit higher/daily timeframe data and pattern recognition beyond the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Approximated using pivot levels (r1/s1) as structural resistance/support, volume_ratio_20 as breakout volume confirmation, and adx_14 for trend confirmation. However, the core signal logic—confluence of lower timeframe breakout with higher timeframe stress at tipping point—requires multi-timeframe comparison not supported by single-timeframe indicators. Stop loss set conservatively at 2% pending [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] calibration.
